examples: Instead of moving at his usual stately pace, he was almost running.
The procession made its stately progress through the streets of the city.
Puss in Boots arrived at a stately castle.
Exuding a stately academic atmosphere, the college campuses are especially attractive when decked out in autumnal hues.
The roofs of the stately wood buildings with detailed carvings sprouted from clusters of gingko and maple trees.
